##NAMES=Arisite-(La)
##RRUFFID=R120051
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=NaLa_2_(CO_3_)_2_[F_2x_(CO_3_)_1-x_]F
##LOCALITY=Aris quarry, near Windhoek, Namibia
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=William W. Pinch
##DESCRIPTION=Pale pink hexagonal tabular crystal, associated with tuperssuatsiaite, and transparent platy polylithionite
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed only by single crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R120051
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 5.121 b: 5.121 c: 8.688 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 120 volume: 197.3 crystal system: hexagonal
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
